generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for position measurement on first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder for position measurement on first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
]

instance SINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing position, speed, acceleration, and motor current data for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
]

instance RobotAxis1SensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, SINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current (I_M) data for motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) data for motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) data for motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearwheelTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) data for gearwheel"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearwheelAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) data for gearwheel"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) data for cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) data for cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data from SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data from SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotAxis1SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for motor in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for gearwheel in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for cycloidal gearbox in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural models of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for digital representation of physical assets"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of robot performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of friction models using white-box and black-box methods"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time motion accuracy improvement based on identified friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization via dashboard for understanding physical relationships"
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalRelationshipsInsight
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters identified from data comparison used to enhance robot control accuracy"
]

instance PhysicalRelationshipsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization providing insights into physical relationships for maintenance and control optimization"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control parameters for real-time motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot comprising motor and two gearboxes (gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox) with a maximum working range of -90° to 90° and maximum speed of 75°/s"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    base:contains RobotFirstAxis, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, SINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data synchronization with live measurements during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes), sensors, data streaming via MQTT, processing components (Simulink models), and visualization dashboard to create a digital shadow for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), using live data during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated vs. measured data for friction identification; multi-physics-aware modeling to account for load, temperature, and time-dependent effects."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset modeling; SysML for system engineering modeling."
]
